response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with a broad full-stack background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience as an open-source platform founder. However, the role is a director-level strategy position centered on recognized AI expertise, and the resume shows only recent, lightweight exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators) rather than demonstrated AI products, platforms, or thought leadership. There is also no evidence of operating at a strategic/advisory altitude with executives or major customers.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform — real builder and entrepreneurial credentials
Active knowledge-sharer: conference talks, workshops, and courses align with the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products; AI exposure is limited to recent agent-tooling contributions
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy, customer advisory, or org-wide influence
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud-platform strategy experience (mostly application-level AWS use)

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategic scope
Deep, broad engineering experience exceeding the 15-year bar
